rationale: Section 49.251 governs consolidated taxing district agreements and references local revenue levels under Section 48.257. It does not set or limit homestead exemption amounts; any revenue impact is captured through existing local revenue level calculations.
quote: The agreement is not effective unless the commissioner certifies that the consolidated taxing district will have a local revenue level equal to or less than the level established under Section 48.257 after all actions taken under this chapter.
_note: No direct conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase would indirectly affect local revenue levels referenced here, but §49.251 contains no provision that sets, limits, or contradicts the exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
